title: Performance & Regression Testing (Lighthouse, ML benchmarks, stress)
description: Comprehensive performance and regression test suite. Tasks: (1) Lighthouse CI audit on popup and options pages (target LCP < 1.5 s, CLS < 0.1); (2) ML benchmark: run True Value + Personal Fit scoring on 50-product fixture dataset, assert p95 latency < 500 ms; (3) bundle size regression gate: assert total < 2.5 MB; (4) storage stress test: fill cache to 50 MB limit, verify LRU eviction; (5) Deep Check rate-limit stress test: verify 10/min ceiling holds; (6) Playwright regression suite — re-run full E2E (P1.14) plus Phase 2 flows. All gates must pass before P2.11.
